title: ebenus stellata
intro: Ebenus stellata, also known as the star thistle or Ebenus, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's root and seeds have been used to create herbal remedies due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Ebenus stellata include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. Ebenus stellata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
